song.title: Out and Proud
song.albumTitle: Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso
song.description: Full lyrics to Out and Proud by Agust Islandia. Track 1 from Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso.

og.title: Out and Proud Lyrics - Agust Islandia
og.description: Track 1 full lyrics page from the 2-track release Gay and Proud / Gay y Orgulloso.

essay: Out and Proud is the English-facing anthem of the release, built as a collective declaration of visibility, solidarity, and unapologetic queer pride in public space.
song.lyricsHtml:
I'm gay proud and out loud
No more whispers I stand in the crowd
Raise my colors break every chain
Love is love and it won't be tamed
I'm gay proud and out loud
Hear my heartbeat it's thunder and sound
Every voice we're stronger unbowed
Gay proud and out loud

Oh oh oh out and free
Ah ah ah sing with me
La la la proud and true
This is love breaking through

We are one the world's out loud
Side by side we own this town
Hand in hand our voices rise
Stronger together no disguise

I'm gay proud and out loud
No more whispers I stand in the crowd
Raise my colors break every chain
Love is love and it won't be tamed
I'm gay proud and out loud
Hear my heartbeat it's thunder and sound
Every voice we're stronger unbowed
Gay proud and out loud

Oh oh oh rainbow skies
Ah ah ah love won't hide
La la la proud and free
This is us our destiny

We are one the world's out loud
Side by side we own this town
Hand in hand our voices rise
Stronger together no disguise

I'm gay proud and out loud
No more whispers I stand in the crowd
Raise my colors break every chain
Love is love and it won't be tamed
I'm gay proud and out loud
Hear my heartbeat it's thunder and sound
Every voice we're stronger unbowed
Gay proud and out loud

No regrets we're here to stay
Louder still the future's ours
Shining bright a million stars

We're gay proud and out loud
No more whispers we stand in the crowd
Raise our colors break every chain
Love is love and it won't be tamed
We're gay proud and out loud
Hear our heartbeat it's thunder and sound
Every voice we're stronger unbowed
Gay proud and out loud
Gay proud and out loud
Gay proud and out loud
